prompt: Help me set up a hub-and-spoke networking topology for my GCP organization using Cloud Foundation Fabric. I need: a hub VPC with 3 subnets across europe-west1, us-central1, and asia-southeast1; two spoke VPCs (dev and prod) each with 1 subnet; VPC peering between hub and each spoke; Cloud NAT on the hub VPC; and a hierarchical firewall policy allowing IAP SSH access. Write the Terraform configurations using CFF modules. Save all output files to outputs/
